cliCommands.name: feature-launchpad <intent-file>
cliCommands.description: Runs Stages 1-3 of the pipeline against an intent file, writing artifacts to generated/feature-launchpad/<feature-name>/.

cliCommands.name: feature-launchpad <intent-file> --output-root <dir>
cliCommands.description: Same as above, writing artifacts under a different output directory.

cliCommands.name: python3 -m feature_launchpad.dashboard
cliCommands.description: Writes a static, read-only status dashboard (env var / API reachability / capabilities) and opens it in a browser.

stages.label: Stage 1 — Read and Normalize Intent
stages.description: Parses an intent file into a normalized field list. No API call.

stages.label: Stage 2 — Reason About UX Flow
stages.description: Calls the Anthropic API to produce a UX flow write-up.

stages.label: Stage 3 — Create Screen Map
stages.description: Calls the Anthropic API to produce a JSON screen map.

stages.label: Stage 4 — Figma Generation
stages.description: Not implemented — the source spec is truncated before this stage is defined.

stages.label: Stage 5 — Implementation Scaffolding
stages.description: Not implemented — the source spec is truncated before this stage is defined.

stages.label: Stage 6 — Validation
stages.description: Not implemented — the source spec is truncated before this stage is defined.

stages.label: Stage 7 — PR Creation
stages.description: Not implemented — the source spec is truncated before this stage is defined.
